summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of AQIS system. Core functionality including AI analysis, query management, and data import working correctly. Fixed Groq API integration using llama-3.3-70b-versatile model.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Minor JSON parsing edge case in backend test, but actual API working correctly
flaky_endpoints.impact: Backend test shows failure but manual testing confirms API working

integration_issues.issue: Export buttons not found on Reports page
Upload history entries not visible after file upload
Query escalation flow had issues during testing

passed_tests: User role access control (admin vs member permissions)
Cycle Management - Create 'MBA 2025-26' cycle and set active
Excel file upload and data import (100 records successfully imported)
All Queries page display with proper filtering and search
Query Detail Drawer with complete query information display
AI Analysis integration - summary, intent detection, urgency analysis, draft response generation
Query action buttons (Mark Resolved, Flag to Admin, Mark Spam) presence
Navigation between all main pages (Upload, All Queries, My Queries, Analytics, etc.)
Analytics page with KPI cards display
Active cycle badge display in header
My Assigned Queries page for member users
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Reports page CSV export buttons, Upload History display, and Escalation dialog functionality. Core AI analysis and query management working perfectly.
